intro: Cacalia fuscopilosa, also known as the Black-stemmed Cacalia or Yellow-flowered Cacalia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Cacalia fuscopilosa has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. Bioactive constituents of Cacalia fuscopilosa include sesquiterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cacalia fuscopilosa is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in formulations to enhance its therapeutic effects.
